sectionHints.checklistStyle: Use short, actionable bullets with leading hyphen dashes ('- ').
sectionHints.timeboxing: Add a trailing timebox in parentheses like (5–10 min).
sectionHints.quantities: Include friendly numbers and consistent units based on unitSystem.
sectionHints.roles: When roles are referenced, prefer '@Person' or 'Role: Caretaker' notation.

sections.goal: Species/breeds, counts, housing, feed types, bedding, constraints, and time budget.
example: - Species: Chickens (12 layers), Quail (6), Rabbits (2 does, 1 buck).
- Housing: Coop + run; quail hutch; rabbit tractors.
- Constraints: School nights; 5 hrs/wk total; minimal bleach use.

sections.goal: Daily checks: feed/water, health glance, bedding spot-clean, egg/production, enrichment.
example: - Check waterers; top off to line; scrub if biofilm (3–5 min).
- Feed ration: ~0.25 lb/bird/day layers; adjust for heat/cold.
- Health glance: eyes, combs, gait; note any limping.
- Spot clean high-soil spots; add dry bedding as needed.
- Collect eggs; record count in logbook/app.

sections.goal: Weekly chores: sanitize waterers/feeders, bedding refresh, coop/hutch checks, enrichment rotation.
example: - Sanitize waterers/feeders (unscented soap + rinse) (15–20 min).
- Replace 1/3 bedding; top with dry carbon.
- Inspect hardware cloth & latches; tighten/replace as needed.
- Rotate enrichment: hang cabbage/greens; add dust bath sand.
- Quarantine/observation pen readiness check.

sections.goal: Health notes: weights/BCS, parasite and vaccination schedule, observation log placeholders.
example: | Group | Weight/BCS | Notes |
| Layers | target 4–5 lb | Check keel bone, feathering |

sections.goal: Feed/bedding/med kits with restock thresholds & storage locations; convert units consistently.
example: - Layer feed: 50 lb bags; threshold: 1 bag; storage: bin A.
- Grit/oyster shell: 5 lb; threshold: 1 lb; storage: bin B.
- Pine shavings: 8 cu ft; threshold: 1 bale; storage: shed.

sections.goal: If applicable: breeding/lay/gestation windows; hatchery or breeding notes; calendar reminders.
example: - Quail: peak lay Apr–Sep; supplement light to 14h in winter.
- Rabbits: 31-day gestation; nest box day 28; palpate day 10–12.

sections.goal: Assign tasks by day/role; on-call fallback; include timeboxes.
example: - @Ami: Daily AM check (10 min), egg collection Mon/Wed/Fri.
- @Ben: Weekly sanitize Saturday (20 min).
- Fallback: 'On-call' handles missed daily by 6pm.

roles.patternHint: Bullets starting with '-' and containing '@Name' or 'Role:' are role tasks.

inventory.patternHint: Lines with 'threshold' and 'storage' should be parsed as {name, quantity, unit, threshold, storage}.

reminders.patternHint: Look for timeboxes in parentheses and cadence words like 'weekly', 'every', 'day X'.
